markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on strategy for the Navan DPA negotiation.](https://fathom.video/share/ZzbGdx31oBTanJCvG2JtefisSCX1wnUj?tab=summary&timestamp=327.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**DPA is unnecessary for current services.** GrowthX's work is limited to public info and client-provided marketing docs, not personal data, making a DPA legally unwarranted.](https://fathom.video/share/ZzbGdx31oBTanJCvG2JtefisSCX1wnUj?tab=summary&timestamp=351.0)
  - [**New strategy: Push back directly.** Instead of redlining an irrelevant DPA, GrowthX will now argue it's not a "processor" and offer to negotiate a DPA only when its future product requires it.](https://fathom.video/share/ZzbGdx31oBTanJCvG2JtefisSCX1wnUj?tab=summary&timestamp=1092.0)
  - [**Goodwin will lead the argument.** John Ng (Goodwin) will join a Friday call with Navan's security/procurement to explain why the DPA is not required.](https://fathom.video/share/ZzbGdx31oBTanJCvG2JtefisSCX1wnUj?tab=summary&timestamp=986.0)
  - [**Future product needs a DPA.** GrowthX will work with Goodwin to create a boilerplate DPA, privacy policy, and ToS for its Q1 product launch.](https://fathom.video/share/ZzbGdx31oBTanJCvG2JtefisSCX1wnUj?tab=summary&timestamp=1367.0)

## Topics

### Navan DPA Negotiation

  - [Navan is requiring a DPA, which is blocking the MSA.](https://fathom.video/share/ZzbGdx31oBTanJCvG2JtefisSCX1wnUj?tab=summary&timestamp=327.0)
  - [**GrowthX's current services do not require a DPA:**](https://fathom.video/share/ZzbGdx31oBTanJCvG2JtefisSCX1wnUj?tab=summary&timestamp=351.0)
      - [Work uses public info (websites) or client-provided marketing docs (brand guidelines, personas).](https://fathom.video/share/ZzbGdx31oBTanJCvG2JtefisSCX1wnUj?tab=summary&timestamp=500.0)
      - [No access to client customer data or PII.](https://fathom.video/share/ZzbGdx31oBTanJCvG2JtefisSCX1wnUj?tab=summary&timestamp=537.0)
      - [GrowthX has successfully pushed back on DPAs with other enterprise clients (e.g., Webflow, Okta).](https://fathom.video/share/ZzbGdx31oBTanJCvG2JtefisSCX1wnUj?tab=summary&timestamp=565.0)
  - [**Goodwin's assessment (John Ng):**](https://fathom.video/share/ZzbGdx31oBTanJCvG2JtefisSCX1wnUj?tab=summary&timestamp=691.0)
      - [The DPA is "ludicrous" for current services; GrowthX is not a "processor."](https://fathom.video/share/ZzbGdx31oBTanJCvG2JtefisSCX1wnUj?tab=summary&timestamp=704.0)
      - [Navan's conservative stance likely stems from CCPA updates that include B2B data.](https://fathom.video/share/ZzbGdx31oBTanJCvG2JtefisSCX1wnUj?tab=summary&timestamp=473.0)
      - [Access to Navan's CMS or Google Analytics does not make GrowthX a processor, as Navan remains the controller of its own systems.](https://fathom.video/share/ZzbGdx31oBTanJCvG2JtefisSCX1wnUj?tab=summary&timestamp=832.0)
  - [**Decision:** Shift from redlining to direct pushback.](https://fathom.video/share/ZzbGdx31oBTanJCvG2JtefisSCX1wnUj?tab=summary&timestamp=1092.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Redlining an irrelevant DPA is inefficient and strategically weak, as it reveals GrowthX cannot meet its terms. It's better to negotiate a relevant DPA later for the future product.](https://fathom.video/share/ZzbGdx31oBTanJCvG2JtefisSCX1wnUj?tab=summary&timestamp=1092.0)

### Future Product Privacy & Legal Needs

  - [GrowthX's product launch (Q1) will require a boilerplate DPA, privacy policy, and Terms of Service (ToS).](https://fathom.video/share/ZzbGdx31oBTanJCvG2JtefisSCX1wnUj?tab=summary&timestamp=1367.0)
  - [**Product context:**](https://fathom.video/share/ZzbGdx31oBTanJCvG2JtefisSCX1wnUj?tab=summary&timestamp=1415.0)
      - [B2B SaaS with a potential self-serve funnel.](https://fathom.video/share/ZzbGdx31oBTanJCvG2JtefisSCX1wnUj?tab=summary&timestamp=1415.0)
      - [May process business contact info, device fingerprinting (IP, browser), and passwords.](https://fathom.video/share/ZzbGdx31oBTanJCvG2JtefisSCX1wnUj?tab=summary&timestamp=423.0)
  - [**Legal strategy for the product:**](https://fathom.video/share/ZzbGdx31oBTanJCvG2JtefisSCX1wnUj?tab=summary&timestamp=1415.0)
      - [Position GrowthX as a "processor" only, not a "controller."](https://fathom.video/share/ZzbGdx31oBTanJCvG2JtefisSCX1wnUj?tab=summary&timestamp=1518.0)
      - [Clarify in the privacy policy that services are for business use and governed by the DPA.](https://fathom.video/share/ZzbGdx31oBTanJCvG2JtefisSCX1wnUj?tab=summary&timestamp=1495.0)
  - [GrowthX will provide Goodwin with a product walkthrough and roadmap to inform document creation.](https://fathom.video/share/ZzbGdx31oBTanJCvG2JtefisSCX1wnUj?tab=summary&timestamp=1591.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Tyler:**](https://fathom.video/share/ZzbGdx31oBTanJCvG2JtefisSCX1wnUj?tab=summary&timestamp=1623.0)
      - [Email Navan to request a Friday meeting with security/procurement, CC'ing John Ng.](https://fathom.video/share/ZzbGdx31oBTanJCvG2JtefisSCX1wnUj?tab=summary&timestamp=1623.0)
      - [State that GrowthX has new legal counsel and will discuss the DPA on the call instead of sending redlines.](https://fathom.video/share/ZzbGdx31oBTanJCvG2JtefisSCX1wnUj?tab=summary&timestamp=1623.0)
  - [**Yousef:**](https://fathom.video/share/ZzbGdx31oBTanJCvG2JtefisSCX1wnUj?tab=summary&timestamp=1331.0)
      - [Send the Navan MSA to John Ng for review.](https://fathom.video/share/ZzbGdx31oBTanJCvG2JtefisSCX1wnUj?tab=summary&timestamp=1331.0)
  - [**Bridget & Yousef:**](https://fathom.video/share/ZzbGdx31oBTanJCvG2JtefisSCX1wnUj?tab=summary&timestamp=1215.0)
      - [Compile a list of enterprise clients (e.g., Okta) who did not require a DPA for similar services.](https://fathom.video/share/ZzbGdx31oBTanJCvG2JtefisSCX1wnUj?tab=summary&timestamp=1215.0)
  - [**John Ng:**](https://fathom.video/share/ZzbGdx31oBTanJCvG2JtefisSCX1wnUj?tab=summary&timestamp=1142.0)
      - [Join the Friday Navan call (availability: 9:30–12 PM PT or 12:30–1 PM PT).](https://fathom.video/share/ZzbGdx31oBTanJCvG2JtefisSCX1wnUj?tab=summary&timestamp=1164.0)
      - [Prepare to argue the DPA is unnecessary and highlight existing protections in the MSA.](https://fathom.video/share/ZzbGdx31oBTanJCvG2JtefisSCX1wnUj?tab=summary&timestamp=1280.0)
